name: Lee Zii Jia
bio: Malaysian men's singles player known for his explosive attacking style and powerful smashes. Former All England champion (2021). Represents Malaysia's best hope in men's singles after Lee Chong Wei's retirement.

name: Ng Tze Yong
bio: Rising Malaysian men's singles player who burst onto the scene at the 2022 Thomas Cup. Known for his tenacity and never-say-die attitude on court.

name: Aaron Chia
bio: Malaysian men's doubles specialist who partners with Soh Wooi Yik. Olympic bronze medalist (Tokyo 2020). Known for powerful front court play and net kills.

name: Soh Wooi Yik
bio: Malaysian men's doubles player partnering Aaron Chia. Olympic bronze medalist (Tokyo 2020). Renowned for his backcourt defense and deceptive shot-making.

name: Pearly Tan
bio: Malaysian women's doubles star who partners with Thinaah Muralitharan. Known as 'Pearly-Thinaah', the pair has become one of the most exciting doubles partnerships in world badminton.

name: Thinaah Muralitharan
bio: Malaysian women's doubles player partnering Pearly Tan. One half of Malaysia's top women's doubles pair, making waves on the international circuit.

name: Goh Sze Fei
bio: Malaysian men's doubles player partnering Nur Izzuddin. Former partner of Nur Izzuddin, competing on the BWF World Tour.

name: Nur Izzuddin
bio: Malaysian men's doubles player who partners with Goh Sze Fei. Quick at the net with strong offensive capabilities.

name: Chen Tang Jie
bio: Malaysian mixed doubles player who partners with Toh Ee Wei. One of Malaysia's top mixed doubles pairs competing at the highest level.

name: Toh Ee Wei
bio: Malaysian mixed doubles player partnering Chen Tang Jie. Known for quick reflexes at the front court and crafty net play.

name: Leong Jun Hao
bio: Young Malaysian men's singles player developing as a future prospect. Part of Malaysia's next generation of shuttlers.

name: Viktor Axelsen
bio: Danish men's singles player, two-time Olympic gold medalist and dominant force in world badminton. Has been world number one for an extended period.

name: Kunlavut Vitidsarn
bio: Thai men's singles player, Olympic silver medalist (Paris 2024) and World Champion. Known for his tactical prowess and consistency.

name: Shi Yu Qi
bio: Chinese men's singles player known for his elegant left-handed style. World Championship medalist and consistent top performer.

name: Anders Antonsen
bio: Danish men's singles player, former World Championship silver medalist. Consistent top-5 player with excellent defensive skills.

name: Jonatan Christie
bio: Indonesian men's singles player, Asian Games gold medalist. Known as 'Jojo', one of Indonesia's leading singles players.

name: Anthony Sinisuka Ginting
bio: Indonesian men's singles player, Olympic bronze medalist (Tokyo 2020). Known for his speed and aggressive playing style.

name: Kodai Naraoka
bio: Japanese men's singles player who rapidly rose through the rankings. Known for his speed and relentless style of play.

name: Loh Kean Yew
bio: Singaporean men's singles player, World Champion 2021. Born in Penang, Malaysia, he became Singapore's first badminton world champion.

name: Chou Tien Chen
bio: Chinese Taipei men's singles veteran. Former world number two and one of the most experienced players on tour.

name: Fajar Alfian
bio: Indonesian men's doubles player partnering Muhammad Rian Ardianto. World number one pair and multiple Super 1000 champions.

name: Muhammad Rian Ardianto
bio: Indonesian men's doubles player partnering Fajar Alfian. Together they form one of the most successful men's doubles pairs in recent years.

name: Kim Astrup
bio: Danish men's doubles player partnering Anders Skaarup Rasmussen. Consistent top-5 men's doubles pair.

name: Anders Skaarup Rasmussen
bio: Danish men's doubles player partnering Kim Astrup. Part of Denmark's strong doubles tradition.

name: Chen Qing Chen
bio: Chinese women's doubles player partnering Jia Yi Fan. Dominant world number one pair and Olympic gold medalists.

name: Jia Yi Fan
bio: Chinese women's doubles player partnering Chen Qing Chen. Together they are the most decorated women's doubles pair of their generation.

name: Zheng Si Wei
bio: Chinese mixed doubles player, partnering Huang Ya Qiong. Olympic gold medalist and the most successful mixed doubles player in history.

name: Huang Ya Qiong
bio: Chinese mixed doubles player partnering Zheng Si Wei. Olympic gold medalist and widely regarded as the greatest female mixed doubles player.
